title: Q4 2025 incident-response improvements
description: Cut the org-wide MTTR on P1 incidents from 47min → 19min over Q4. Drove three changes: standardized incident-commander rotation, a new shared runbook template, and an auto-paging review for every P1 within 48hrs. 0 P1s missed pager during the holiday peak.

title: Author org-wide incident postmortem template
description: Replaces the previous ad-hoc postmortem format with a structured template covering: timeline, contributing factors (not 'root cause'), customer impact, action items with owners + due dates, and a 'what went well' section. Adopted across all 7 SRE-aligned teams in Q1.

title: Maintain fraud-scoring system reliability through Q4 holiday traffic
description: Filed this to make Rayan's solo 18-month maintenance work visible for the next promo cycle. SRE-side support: shared on-call coverage, runbook reviews, kill-switch drills.
